# Project Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by /ccfold. Manual edits are preserved on re-fold. -->

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** `gh`
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/mcp-server-nerf.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** `main`
- **Merge strategy:** squash
- **Branch naming:** `<type>/<N>-description` (types: `feature`, `fix`, `chore`, `docs`)

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** GitHub native (issue state: open → closed)
- **Agent instruction:** Use `gh issue close <N>` on merge. Verify closure via `gh issue view <N> --json state`. PR bodies must include `Closes #N` for auto-close.

## Existing Labels
<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict. Both the legacy GitHub
     defaults and the `group::value` taxonomy coexist. New issues should
     prefer the `group::value` form (per CLAUDE.md "Work Item Standards"). -->

**`group::value` taxonomy** (canonical for new issues):

- **Type:** `type::bug`, `type::chore` — extend with `type::feature`, `type::docs`, `type::epic` as needed
- **Priority:** `priority::high`, `priority::medium` — extend with `priority::critical`, `priority::low` as needed
- **Urgency:** `urgency::soon`, `urgency::normal` — extend with `urgency::immediate`, `urgency::eventual` as needed
- **Severity** (bugs only): `severity::major` — extend with `severity::critical`, `severity::minor`, `severity::cosmetic` as needed
- **Size:** `size::S` — extend with `size::M`, `size::L`, `size::XL` as needed
- **Wave** (wave-planned work only): not yet bootstrapped — `wave::1`, `wave::2`, etc.

**GitHub default labels** (kept for backward compatibility, not in active use for new issues):

- `bug`, `documentation`, `duplicate`, `enhancement`, `good first issue`, `help wanted`, `invalid`, `question`, `wontfix`

## Toolchain
- **Runtime:** Bun
- **Language:** TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Validation:** `scripts/ci/validate.sh` (lint + test)
- **Tests:** `bun test` (also `scripts/ci/test.sh`)
- **Lint:** `bun run lint` (wraps `bunx tsc --noEmit`) — also `scripts/ci/lint.sh`
- **Build:** `scripts/ci/build.sh <target>` (e.g., `bun-linux-x64`, `bun-darwin-arm64`)
- **Release:** `scripts/ci/release.sh` (triggered by version tags)
- **Package manifest:** `package.json`

## CI
- **System:** GitHub Actions
- **Config:**
  - `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — runs on push/PR
  - `.github/workflows/release.yml` — runs on version tag push
